offer: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 loads/week, inefficient load optimization causes increased operational costs. We automate dispatch instead of manual load planning and dispatching.
problem: Inefficient load optimization leading to increased operational costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers

try_it: Let users try manual load entry and basic reporting dashboard on 1-3 items

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
